analysis: This solution scaled the CodeBERT DualEncoder architecture by training on 30,000 notebooks (vs 10k), increasing max_len from 128 to 256, and training for 2 epochs using both H100 GPUs. The validation score improved further from 0.8130 to 0.8381, demonstrating that the soft continuous boundary expectation effectively mimics bipartite alignment while scaling seamlessly without memory issues.
